ogTitle: Bell Post Hill vs Bellarine: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bell Post Hill and Bellarine.
heading: Bell Post Hill vs Bellarine — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bell Post Hill, Victoria and Bellarine, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bellarine has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Bell Post Hill (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bell Post Hill or Bellarine safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bell Post Hill has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Bellarine scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bell Post Hill scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Bellarine scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bell Post Hill or Bellarine?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bellarine has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
